name: HVAC > Install / Replace HVAC Filter
taxonomy_path: Labor > HVAC > Install / Replace HVAC Filter
basis: Pull old filter, verify size/airflow arrow, insert new filter at return or air handler. Filter ~$20. Fully handyman-legal, no refrigerant/electrical.
sources: Homewyse/Angi maintenance; filter swap is a no-tool return-grille/air-handler slot change. Task-only trivial; mostly a minimum visit + filter cost. Mid-grade pleated filter ~$15-25.

name: HVAC > Install Mini Split
refer_note: HVAC install and refrigerant work needs a licensed HVAC contractor and a permit. We coordinate a licensed sub.
basis: REFER: mini split install involves refrigerant line set/vacuum/charge, a dedicated electrical circuit, condensate, wind-load bracket, and FL permit - licensed HVAC + electrical. Priced for reference only; material via licensed contractor.
sources: Florida single-zone ductless install $1,800-$5,500; per-zone $2,000-$7,000 (bulletproofair, texastempmasters, City ACS 2026). Requires refrigerant, dedicated circuit, permit.

name: HVAC > Install Window AC
basis: Install window AC unit: fit to window, mount support bracket, secure sash, weatherseal side panels, plug in. Bracket/seal kit ~$20. Handyman-legal (self-contained, no refrigerant work, standard plug). REFER only if a new circuit is needed.
sources: Handyman window AC install/support $75-$175; sealed pre-charged unit into existing window, plugs into existing outlet. Task-only ~$80-130.

name: HVAC > Program Thermostat
basis: Program existing thermostat: set schedule, connect to wifi/app, configure heat/cool setpoints, test cycle. No material. Config-only, handyman-legal.
sources: Handyman/smart-home setup $50-$100; programming/wifi pairing only, no wiring change. Task-only ~$45-75.

name: HVAC > Replace Swamp Cooler (Complete Unit)
taxonomy_path: Labor > HVAC > Replace Swamp Cooler (Complete Unit)
refer_note: HVAC install and refrigerant work needs a licensed HVAC contractor and a permit. We coordinate a licensed sub.
basis: REFER: full swamp-cooler swap ties into electrical, plumbing water supply, and duct/roof penetration - licensed trades + permit. Priced for reference only. Old unit haul-off. Note: evaporative coolers are uncommon/ineffective in Brevard's humidity.
sources: Evaporative cooler replacement $700-$1,500 nat'l (labor+unit); requires roof/wall penetration, water line, electrical hookup, ductwork. Rare in humid FL. Cross-check thin.

name: HVAC > Replace Swamp Cooler Motor
taxonomy_path: Labor > HVAC > Replace Swamp Cooler Motor
refer_note: Scope may need a licensed HVAC contractor. We confirm before quoting.
basis: Replace evap cooler blower motor: disconnect power, remove belt/pulley, swap motor, re-tension, wire, test. Motor ~$90. VERIFY: motor swap is repair-legal, but line-voltage reconnection is a gray zone - confirm scope on site.
sources: Evaporative cooler motor replacement $150-$300 incl part; blower motor ~$80-120. Task-only labor ~$100-150. Obscure/rare in FL.

name: HVAC > Replace Swamp Cooler Pads
taxonomy_path: Labor > HVAC > Replace Swamp Cooler Pads
basis: Replace evaporative cooler pads: open panels, remove old aspen/cellulose pads, clean frames, fit new pads, close. Pad set ~$35. Maintenance swap, handyman-legal.
sources: Cooler pad replacement $75-$150; consumable maintenance, no electrical/plumbing. Task-only ~$70-110. Rare in FL.

name: HVAC > Replace Swamp Cooler Pump
taxonomy_path: Labor > HVAC > Replace Swamp Cooler Pump
basis: Replace evap cooler water pump: drain reservoir, disconnect tubing and plug, swap submersible pump, reconnect, test flow. Pump ~$40. Component swap on plug-in pump, handyman-legal.
sources: Cooler recirc pump replacement $90-$180 incl part; small submersible pump swap. Task-only ~$80-130. Rare in FL.

name: HVAC > Replace Swamp Cooler Spider
taxonomy_path: Labor > HVAC > Replace Swamp Cooler Spider
basis: Replace cooler spider (water distribution tubing that spreads water over pads): remove clogged tubing, fit new spider/tubing kit, verify even flow. Kit ~$15. Maintenance swap, handyman-legal.
sources: Evap cooler water-distribution 'spider' tubing kit $10-$25 part; quick maintenance swap. Task-only labor ~$55-90. Obscure item.

name: HVAC > Replace Thermostat
basis: Replace thermostat: kill power, photo/label existing low-voltage wires, mount new base, transfer wires (add C-wire if present), set, test heat/cool. Mid-grade smart/programmable ~$45. Low-voltage swap, handyman-legal per FL 489 exemption.
sources: Homewyse replace thermostat $391-$469 (incl premium unit/matl); handyman labor $40-$80/hr; smart tstat swap common. Task-only labor Melbourne ~$90-130 for a like-for-like swap.
